pname: 4 Bedroom House for sale in Sanjeev Nagar, Bhopal
description: Located in the vibrant community of new jail road, elixir garden in bhopal, a stunning opportunity awaits. Presenting a luxurious 4 bhk corner residential house, this property epitomizes elegance and comfort. From its spacious interiors to its serene surroundings, every aspect of this home reflects modern living at its finest. Property specifications This meticulously designed 4 bhk residential property boasts a super area of 2250 sqft and is thoughtfully crafted according to vaastu principles. Facing east, this home welcomes abundant natural light and positive energy throughout the day. Spread across a g+2 structure, each floor offers a perfect blend of functionality and comfort. Ground floor: The ground floor features a spacious living room, a well-Appointed open kitchen with a chimney and a dining area, two bedrooms, and two bathrooms (One attached and one common). Both indian and western-Style amenities are provided, with geysers in all bathrooms for added convenience. First floor: On the first floor, you'll find two cozy bedrooms with attached western-Style bathrooms, along with a charming balcony and separate pooja room. Second floor: The third floor offers a serene retreat with an open terrace, perfect for relaxation or entertaining under the open sky. The ground floor also boasts a modern modular kitchen with a chimney, ensuring an enjoyable and convenient cooking experience. Throughout the property, the elegant tile flooring adds timeless charm and is easy to maintain. This residence epitomizes contemporary living at its best. Facilities The property offers 1 open parking space and 24/7 security with cctv surveillance at the entrance of the colony. Locality Convenience is at your doorstep, with schools, hospitals, malls, and supermarkets all within a 1 km radius, ensuring easy access to essential amenities. Public transport options are abundant, with buses and auto-Rickshaws readily available for daily commutes. Additionally, banks and atms are conveniently located nearby.
